economic_notes: Akisq'nuk is located near Windermere BC. GBEs include Akisq'nuk Natural Resources Corporation, 0910003 BC Ltd., and Akisq'nuk Resources Limited Partnership. Investments held in Ktunaxa Enterprises Ltd., Ktunaxa Holdings Limited Partnership, SEM Resort entities, BCFN Gaming Revenue LP, All Nations Trust Company. COVID-19 pandemic noted as impacting operations.
notes: Fiscal year 2021 (ended March 31, 2021). Consolidated entities include Eva Joseph Early Learning and Cultural Society, Columbia Lake Recreation Society, Akisq'nuk Housing Society, and 1285651 BC Ltd. GBEs accounted for on modified equity basis: Akisq'nuk Natural Resources Corporation, 0910003 BC Ltd., and Akisq'nuk Resources Limited Partnership. Revenue includes $7,642,184 from Province of BC which is unusually high vs prior year $4,037,695 — likely related to Rights and Title segment showing $7,934,868 in other revenue. Large ISC deferred revenue balance of $1,694,194 includes a $92,426 non-interest bearing loan advance for a timber claim. No schedule of remuneration included in the extracted text. OSR calculated as total revenue minus all government transfers (ISC + BC + KNC + FNHA + Other FN + Grants + CMHC).
